prd.oneLiner: Connect learner goals, course interest, consultation and application history, enrollment stages, and course performance.
prd.goal: Increase consultation-to-enrollment conversion by 15% and standardize applicant follow-up.
prd.whyNow: Inquiries, consultation notes, application documents, and enrollment status are scattered, making tailored course advice and follow-up difficult.
prd.problem: Inquiries, consultation notes, application documents, and enrollment status are scattered, making tailored course advice and follow-up difficult.
prd.solution: Connect learner goals, course interest, consultation and application history, enrollment stages, and course performance.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Admissions or course advisor
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Inquiries, consultation notes, application documents, and enrollment status are scattered, making tailored course advice and follow-up difficult.

targets.name: Education operations and admissions coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Inquiries, consultation notes, application documents, and enrollment status are scattered, making tailored course advice and follow-up difficult.

scenarios.text: Admissions or course advisor completes course inquiry and consultation-request capture and checks progress.
Education operations and admissions coordinator reviews inquiry source, consultation conversion, and enrollment-performance reporting by course.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Increase consultation-to-enrollment conversion by 15% and standardize applicant follow-up.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Learner interest, consultation, application, and enrollment-status lookup
Advisor assignment, course recommendation, application-document, and enrollment-progress management
Inquiry source, consultation conversion, and enrollment-performance reporting by course
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
